recommendations.title: Tokyo Drifter
recommendations.overview: After yakuza boss Kurata dissolves his own criminal empire, a rival kingpin offers a position to Kurata's top operative, Tetsuya "Phoenix Tetsu" Hondo. When the fiercely loyal Tetsu declines, Otsuka taps unstoppable Tatsuzo the "Viper", a ruthless gu

recommendations.title: Dabangg 2
recommendations.overview: Chulbul Pandey invites a fresh trouble when he kills the brother of a notorious politician and the former swears to wreak havoc in his life.

recommendations.title: Let's Be Evil
recommendations.overview: A woman enters an underground bunker where gifted children use augmented reality technology to wreak havoc.

recommendations.title: Ace Attorney
recommendations.overview: Based primarily on the first game in the series, Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney, the film focuses on rookie defense attorney Phoenix Wright, as he strives to protect his clients in various murder trials, including the death of his mentor, Mia Fey, and

recommendations.title: Split Second
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Action, Crime, Thriller, Horror
recommendations.overview: In a flooded future London, Detective Harley Stone hunts a serial killer who murdered his partner and has haunted him ever since — but he soon discovers what he is hunting might not be human.

recommendations.title: Phoenix Forgotten
recommendations.overview: Twenty years after three teenagers disappeared in the wake of mysterious lights appearing above Phoenix, Arizona, unseen footage from that night has been discovered, chronicling the final hours of their fateful expedition.

recommendations.title: Slumber Party Massacre II
recommendations.overview: Courtney is tormented by dreams of the infamous Driller Killer returning to wreak havoc... only to find that the murderous monster is reincarnated as an evil rocker.

recommendations.title: London Calling
recommendations.overview: After fleeing the UK from a job gone wrong, a down on his luck hitman is forced to babysit the son of his new crime boss and show him how to become a man.

recommendations.title: Trick
recommendations.overview: A detective tries to track down a masked killer who reappears every Halloween to wreak bloody havoc.

recommendations.title: Sherlock Holmes
recommendations.overview: Eccentric consulting detective Sherlock Holmes and Doctor John Watson battle to bring down a new nemesis and unravel a deadly plot that could destroy England.
